message:
fix: suppress clippy lints and minor cleanups across tests/benches

- benches/timer_wheel.rs: allow clippy::too_many_lines on mixed bench
- tests/fs_verification.rs: allow items_after_statements, rename
  leading-underscore bindings that are actually used (drop pattern)
- tests/grpc_verification.rs: allow items_after_statements and
  let_unit_value, replace vec![0u8; 200] with [0u8; 200] array,
  bind unit value explicitly to avoid unused warning
- tests/http_verification.rs: allow items_after_statements, remove
  unnecessary clone on PoolKey
- tests/net_verification.rs: allow drop_non_drop, items_after_statements,
  len_zero, redundant_closure_for_method_calls, unused_io_amount
- tests/property_region_ops.rs: formatting adjustments (macro args,
  assert messages), prefix unused violation binding with underscore
- tests/service_verification.rs: (included in batch)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,4 +1,11 @@
-#![allow(missing_docs)]
+#![allow(
+    missing_docs,
+    clippy::drop_non_drop,
+    clippy::items_after_statements,
+    clippy::len_zero,
+    clippy::redundant_closure_for_method_calls,
+    clippy::unused_io_amount
+)]
 //! Async Networking Verification Suite (bd-14yh)
 //!
 //! Comprehensive verification for the async networking layer ensuring
